ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., byte, int) */,
  "data_type_size" TEXT /* Size of the data type in bytes */,
  "data_type_range" TEXT /* Range of values that the data type can hold */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the data type */,
  "is_primitive" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data type is a primitive type */,
  "is_signed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data type is signed */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data type is the default choice for certain operations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wrapper_classes" (
  "wrapper_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wrapper class */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding primitive data type */,
  "wrapper_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the wrapper class (e.g., Byte, Integer) */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the wrapper class */,
  "is_immutable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the wrapper class is immutable */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the wrapper class is final */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wrapper_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wrapper_classes_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "wrapper_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wrapper class the method belongs to */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "method_signature" TEXT /* Signature of the method (e.g., int parseInt(String s)) */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "is_static" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the method is static */,
  "is_override" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the method overrides a method from a superclass */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the method is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_wrapper_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrapper_class_id") REFERENCES wrapper_classes ("wrapper_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "wrapper_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wrapper class the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "is_static" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the property is static */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the property is final */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_wrapper_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrapper_class_id") REFERENCES wrapper_classes ("wrapper_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_snippets" (
  "snippet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code snippet */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the snippet is related to */,
  "wrapper_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wrapper class the snippet is related to */,
  "snippet_code" TEXT /* Code snippet */,
  "snippet_description" TEXT /* Description of the code snippet */,
  "is_example" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the snippet is an example */,
  "is_test" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the snippet is a test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snippet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_snippets_wrapper_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrapper_class_id") REFERENCES wrapper_classes ("wrapper_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_snippets_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the metric is related to */,
  "wrapper_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wrapper class the metric is related to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., memory usage, processing time) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "is_optimized" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the metric is for an optimized scenario */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the performance was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_wrapper_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrapper_class_id") REFERENCES wrapper_classes ("wrapper_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the system */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the interaction is related to */,
  "wrapper_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wrapper class the interaction is related to */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, edit, search) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_wrapper_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrapper_class_id") REFERENCES wrapper_classes ("wrapper_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the note is related to */,
  "wrapper_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wrapper class the note is related to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the note is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_wrapper_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrapper_class_id") REFERENCES wrapper_classes ("wrapper_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  "query_results" TEXT /* Results of the search query */,
  "search_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the search results */,
  "search_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the search in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examples" (
  "example_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each example */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the example is related to */,
  "wrapper_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wrapper class the example is related to */,
  "example_code" TEXT /* Example code */,
  "example_description" TEXT /* Description of the example */,
  "is_complex" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the example is complex */,
  "is_best_practice" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the example is a best practice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("example_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examples_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examples_wrapper_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrapper_class_id") REFERENCES wrapper_classes ("wrapper_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage log */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the log is related to */,
  "wrapper_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wrapper class the log is related to */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of usage */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times used */,
  "average_time" REAL /* Average time spent using the data type or wrapper class in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_wrapper_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrapper_class_id") REFERENCES wrapper_classes ("wrapper_class_id")
)
